mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.email AS user_email FROM user_consent c INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.id DESC
SELECT c.*, u.email AS user_email FROM user_consent c INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.consent_type = #{consentType} ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_consent (user_id, consent_type, agreed, agreed_at, revoked_at, source) VALUES (#{userId}, #{consentType}, #{agreed}, #{agreedAt}, #{revokedAt}, #{source})
